summary: By default bumps are allowed to be edited (moved, deleted, reassigned, swapped). If this variable is set to FALSE, any bump edit command for a bump with routing connected to it will give an error message and fail.
description: By default bumps are allowed to be edited (moved, deleted, reassigned, swapped). If this variable is set to FALSE, any bump edit command for a bump with routing connected to it will give an error message and fail.
